name: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind

issues.description: SearchDeck action missing required filter for card type (Egghead) and card name exclusion (He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind)
SearchDeck should specify max 1 card revealed from top 5 of deck; filter.kind should be 'Type' with value 'Egghead' and exclusion for specific card name
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard is incorrect; card text describes placing remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order, not drawing a card
DrawCard action should not exist; remaining cards should be returned to bottom of deck via ReturnToHand or equivalent ordering mechanic

filter.exclude: He Possesses the World's Most Brilliant Mind
